problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Autophagy. Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
